APPEARING VIA COURTCALL FOR DEFENDANT RAMON SENERES. PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE HEARD ON 07/02/20 WAS DENIED BY THE COURT, HOWEVER ORAL ARGUMENT WOULD BE ENTERTAINED AT TRIAL CALL. THE COURT HEARD FURTHER ORAL ARGUMENT FROM ALL PARTIES AND GRANTED THE MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT CONTINUED THE TRIAL DATE TO OCT-26-2020, A DATE AGREEABLE BY ALL PARTIES, AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. DISCOVERY REMAINS OPEN 30 DAYS BEFORE THE NEW TRIAL DATE. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. THE COURT ALSO ASSIGNED A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TO THE HONORABLE CURTIS E.A. KARNOW IN DEPT. 611 FOR TODAY, 07/06/20, AT 11:00 AM. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)
